children.name: I build immersive experiences for brands with direction and momentum. I am Alex Chen.
children.characters:
I build immersive experiences for brands with direction and momentum.
I am Alex Chen.

children.name: A creative developer with 5 years of experience building high-performance websites and digital products. I work at the intersection of design and code, where aesthetics meet functionality.
children.characters: A creative developer  with 5 years of experience building  high-performance websites and digital  products. I work at the intersection  of design and code, where aesthetics  meet functionality.

children.name: My focus is on motion, interaction, and the details that make a product feel alive.
children.characters: My focus is on motion, interaction,  and the details that make a product  feel alive.

children.name: From landing pages to full web applications - built with clean code, smooth animations, and pixel-perfect attention to detail.
children.characters: From landing pages to  full web applications - built with  clean code, smooth animations, and  pixel-perfect attention to detail.

children.name: GSAP, Framer Motion, CSS animations — I bring interfaces to life with purposeful, fluid motion that enhances the user experience.
children.characters: GSAP, Framer Motion, CSS  animations — I bring interfaces to  life with purposeful, fluid motion  that enhances the user experience.

children.name: Got a Figma file? I'll turn it into a production-ready website that looks exactly like the design — down to the pixel.
children.characters: Got a Figma file? I'll  turn it into a production-ready  website that looks exactly like  the design — down to the pixel.

children.name: Currently available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. Open to work worldwide.
children.characters: Currently available for freelance  projects and full-time opportunities. Open to work worldwide.

children.name: Want a portfolio that moves, breathes, and leaves an impression? Let's build yours
children.characters: Want a portfolio that moves, breathes, and leaves an impression? Let's build yours

children.name: "Alex didn't just build a website - he built our brand's voice. Clean, intentional, and a pleasure to work with."
children.characters: "Alex didn't just build a website - he built our brand's voice. Clean, intentional, and a pleasure to work with."
